# SRC032 - Google Ads API: Create Campaigns

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | Platform APIs |
| Authors / source | Google |
| Year | Current |
| Source type | Official API docs |
| Quality | High |
| URL | [https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/campaigns/create-campaigns](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/campaigns/create-campaigns) |

## Bias / limitation

Official platform docs.

## Core takeaway

Campaigns, budgets, bidding, campaign type, and dates can be created through the API.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to build payload planning and launch runbooks.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.
